name: codeflow-maintainer
description: Implements the OpenClaw maintainer PR workflow with structured modes (triage, review, prepare, merge, post-merge), each with allowed actions, focus areas, and checkpoint questions.

interface.shortDescription: Implements the OpenClaw maintainer PR workflow with structured modes (triage, review, prepare, merge, post-merge), each with allowed actions, focus areas, and checkpoint questions.
interface.longDescription: Drive a PR through triage, review, prepare, merge, and post-merge modes, answering the checkpoint questions before each transition.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use CodeFlow Maintainer Skill safely.
